envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Connector implementation-readiness matrix per ADR-0084. Deterministic weighted ranking across 13 scoring dimensions. Suggest-only — first real connector decision (C2) remains Founder-gated.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Higher composite score = more ready for first-slice implementation. Composite weighting prioritizes first-week aha value + API maturity + read value + workflow binding while penalizing write risk + implementation complexity + DMW scope complexity. Treat ranking as a recommendation surface, never as authority.

official_docs_refs: see per-connector readiness files in docs/connector-readiness/
items.MCP_posture: Matrix-level: per-connector MCP availability captured in individual readiness files; matrix does not score MCP availability separately.
items.OAuth_model: Matrix-level: per-connector OAuth model captured in individual readiness files.
items.app_installation_model: Matrix-level: per-connector installation model captured in individual readiness files.
items.admin_consent_model: Matrix-level: per-connector admin consent model captured in individual readiness files.
required_approval_gates: Founder authorization for any C2+ runtime activation
Per-connector RULE 21 research arc completion (this catalog is the substrate; runtime authorization remains separate)
DMW_scope_implications: Matrix is recommendation substrate; per-connector DMW implications captured in individual readiness files.
Dandelion_map_dependencies: Tool Map must approve each ranked connector individually
Workflow Map must approve workflows by purpose for each ranked connector
Authority Map must approve write authority for each ranked connector
Memory / DMW Map must approve memory scope for each ranked connector
Risk Map must clear each ranked connector
secret_handling_requirements: Matrix is metadata-only; secrets are per-connector
no_leak_rules: Matrix is metadata-only; no payload data
tenant_isolation_requirements: Matrix is reference data; per-connector tenant isolation per individual files
items.rate_limit_notes: Matrix is reference data; rate limits per individual connector files.
implementation_risks: Matrix ranking is a recommendation surface, not authority
C2 first real connector decision remains Founder-gated
Substrate-honest disclaimer: ranking reflects 2026-06-01 research arc captured at this commit; vendor APIs evolve
items.first_slice_recommendation: By matrix composite: Slack (top) → Linear → Jira → Google Workspace → GitHub → Microsoft 365. Recommend C2 = Slack read-first runtime per ADR-0084 first-connector candidate arc + Wave 6 matrix alignment. Recommend GOVSEC.6 before or alongside C2 to harden against agent-abuse / confused-deputy.

matrix_rankings.recommendation: First real connector candidate per ADR-0084 + Wave 6 matrix
Strong second-tier read-first candidate; MCP fit + lower OAuth complexity
Project / Engineering pack anchor; coordinate with Linear under Project Tracker family
High read value but high admin complexity; pair domain-wide-delegation review with C3 activation
Strong auditability + MCP fit; production-effect write risk requires late-C-slice + dual-control
Highest enterprise admin complexity + write risk; defer until after Google Workspace + Slack established

items.composite_formula: Composite = (first_week_aha_value*0.18 + API_maturity*0.14 + read_value*0.14 + workflow_binding_value*0.13 + event_webhook_value*0.09 + auditability*0.09 + MCP_fit*0.06 + (10-OAuth_complexity)*0.05 + (10-write_risk)*0.04 + (10-enterprise_admin_complexity)*0.03 + (10-data_sensitivity)*0.02 + (10-implementation_complexity)*0.02 + (10-DMW_scope_complexity)*0.01). Weights bias toward read-first first-week-value + auditability while penalizing implementation friction.
items.suggest_only_disclaimer: This matrix is suggest-only. No runtime connector is implemented. C2 real connector remains Founder-gated. Final selection should consider customer demand signals + Dandelion map outputs + GOVSEC.6 readiness in addition to this matrix.
